scripts.dev:electron: concurrently "npm run web" "wait-on http://localhost:3001 && electron electron/main.js"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n electron,ios,android,lg "npm run dev:electron" "npm run ios" "npm run android" "npm run sim:lg"
scripts.build:web: expo export --platform web --clear && node scripts/obfuscate.js dist web
scripts.build:electron: rm -rf dist electron/release && npm run build:web && electron-builder --config electron/builder.json --publish never
scripts.build:tv: EXPO_PUBLIC_TV=1 expo export --platform web --output-dir tv/dist --clear && node tv/patch-index.js && node scripts/obfuscate.js tv/dist tv
scripts.sim:lg: npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && ares-launch -s 26 tv/packaging/lg
scripts.sim:lg:inspect: npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && node tv/enable-inspector.js && (pkill -f webOS_TV_26_Simulator_1.5.0 || true) && sleep 3 && ares-launch -s 26 tv/packaging/lg
scripts.deploy:lg: npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/out && ares-package tv/packaging/lg -o tv/packaging/lg/out && ares-install tv/packaging/lg/out/*.ipk -d lg && ares-launch com.andrew1h1.suvo -d lg
scripts.debug:lg: npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/lg/ && rm -rf tv/packaging/lg/out && ares-package tv/packaging/lg -o tv/packaging/lg/out --no-minify && ares-install tv/packaging/lg/out/*.ipk -d lg && ares-inspect -d lg -a com.andrew1h1.suvo --open
scripts.sim:tizen: npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/samsung/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/samsung/ && tizen package -t wgt -o tv/packaging/samsung -- tv/packaging/samsung && (em-cli launch --name "${TIZEN_EMU:-T-10.0-x86_64}" || true) && sleep 8 && tizen install -n IptvPlayer.wgt -t "${TIZEN_EMU:-T-10.0-x86_64}" -- tv/packaging/samsung && tizen run -p IptvPlayer.Suvo -t "${TIZEN_EMU:-T-10.0-x86_64}"
scripts.deploy:tizen: test -n "$TIZEN_TV_IP" || { echo 'Set TIZEN_TV_IP to your TV IP (Developer Mode must be on), e.g. TIZEN_TV_IP=192.168.1.42 npm run deploy:tizen'; exit 1; } && npm run build:tv && rm -rf tv/packaging/samsung/_expo && cp -r tv/dist/* tv/packaging/samsung/ && tizen package -t wgt -o tv/packaging/samsung -- tv/packaging/samsung && sdb connect "$TIZEN_TV_IP" && tizen install -n IptvPlayer.wgt -t "${TIZEN_TV:-$TIZEN_TV_IP}" -- tv/packaging/samsung && tizen run -p IptvPlayer.Suvo -t "${TIZEN_TV:-$TIZEN_TV_IP}"
